title: Greek Lamb Skewers with Crunchy Topping
description: A delicious and easy-to-make Greek-inspired dish featuring lamb skewers with a crunchy topping. Perfect for a quick dinner or lunch.
instructions: Thread lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving space between each piece.
In a small bowl, mix together minced garlic, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Brush the garlic mixture onto the lamb skewers.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, mix together chopped parsley and crunchy topping of your choice.
Serve the lamb skewers hot, topped with the crunchy topping.
